title: Multi-Format Workflow: CSV and Excel Together in Datilio
summary: Real teams juggle CSV system dumps and Excel planning sheets. Datilio handles both with one workflow.

content.summary: Real teams juggle CSV system dumps and Excel planning sheets. Datilio handles both with one workflow.

body.text: Different formats should not mean different quality standards. Preview every upload. Align column names where possible. Document which file is system of record.

body.caption: Team meeting with presentation screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Preview every upload. Align column names where possible. Document which file is system of record.
Apply parallel saved rules to parallel files when comparing plan vs actual.

items: Do not mix grains in one chart.
Re-export Excel to CSV if structures diverge often.
Use synthetic copies to train on each format.

body.text: Chart each file separately, then compare insights with explicit period labels.
Talk to Data stays within each upload's context.
Datilio multi-format support respects how files actually arrive on Monday morning.
